name: Andhra Pradesh MSME Interest Subsidy Scheme
administered_by: Department of Industries and Commerce, Government of Andhra Pradesh
retrieval_text: The Andhra Pradesh government provides interest subsidy to new manufacturing MSME units under the AP Industrial Development Policy. Subsidy of 5-9% per annum on term loans is provided for a period of 5 years for eligible plant and machinery investments, with enhanced rates for SC/ST and women entrepreneurs and for enterprises in backward areas and special economic zones. The scheme has no direct loan component; it reimburses the interest differential after verification of loan repayment. Applicants must have commenced commercial production during the operative period and applied within one year of first loan disbursement. Apply at apindustries.gov.in.
documents_required: Term Loan Sanction Letter from Bank/FI
Term Loan Account Statement (showing interest paid and repayments)
Invoices and Payment Proof for Plant & Machinery
Proof of Commencement of Commercial Production
Bank Account Statement of the enterprise
Memorandum of Association & Articles of Association (for Companies) / Partnership Deed (for Partnerships) / Proprietorship Declaration
Caste Certificate (for SC/ST entrepreneurs) / Proof of Gender (for women entrepreneurs)
